bugs.error_message: GET /projects/{id}/my-permissions returns 500 on first call, 200 on retry. Causes workspace to show only 3 tabs instead of 7.
bugs.root_cause: Backend permissions endpoint has a transient 500 on first invocation (likely cold-start race). Frontend catch handler returned empty permissions with isAdmin=false.
bugs.fix: Added retry logic with 500ms delay in loadProject(). First call is tried, on failure it retries once before falling back to empty permissions.

bugs.error_message: ApiError: Internal Server Error on GET /api/extensions/departments — department page fails to load on initial visit after container restart
bugs.root_cause: Gateway container startup race condition: LangGraph SQLite checkpointer fails to initialize before first HTTP requests arrive (sqlite3.OperationalError: unable to open database file), causing first 2-3 department API calls to return 500 even though PostgreSQL is healthy
bugs.fix: Added retry logic (2 retries with 1.5s delay) to loadData() in departments page. The underlying SQLite startup race is a separate issue in deerflow/persistence/engine.py but doesn't affect data integrity.

bugs.error_message: Dashboard components show black borders after client-side navigation via sidebar
bugs.root_cause: Tailwind CSS v4 .border utility only sets border-width/border-style in @layer utilities, but border-color relies on @layer base rule. During client-side navigation with Turbopack HMR, base layer border-color can briefly not apply, causing fallback to currentColor (black).
bugs.fix: Added explicit border-border class to all dashboard elements using border class. This puts border-color in @layer utilities (higher cascade priority). Also added @source inline border-border to globals.css.

bugs.error_message: WorkflowEditor property panel inputs/checkboxes not working — typed text doesn't update, checkbox doesn't toggle
bugs.root_cause: selectedNode was stored as a snapshot via useState on node click, but never re-derived from the latest nodes array. When updateNodeData modified nodes, the property panel still read from the stale snapshot, so input values never reflected edits.
bugs.fix: Changed selectedNode state from storing the full DAGNode snapshot to storing only selectedNodeId (string). Derived selectedNode via useMemo from the latest nodes array, so the property panel always reads current data.

bugs.error_message: 403 Permission denied: system:access when custom role user accesses project detail
bugs.root_cause: Custom roles (writer/reviewer/dept_head) created without system:access, required by all extension API endpoints
bugs.fix: Manually added system:access to all custom roles via PUT /api/extensions/roles/{id}

bugs.root_cause: Unknown - gateway logs not accessible. Likely unhandled exception in submit_approval

bugs.error_message: User list shows stale department name after dept_id update via API
bugs.root_cause: User list API may use cached dept name or incorrect JOIN
bugs.fix: Not yet fixed - DB confirmed correct, issue in API/frontend

bugs.error_message: DELETE /project/projects/{id} returns 500 Internal Server Error when trying to delete any project card
bugs.root_cause: ORM model ApprovalWorkflow defines reviewer_id column but the database table approval_workflows was missing that column. When deleting a project, SQLAlchemy cascade loads approval_workflows, the SELECT includes the missing column, causing asyncpg UndefinedColumnError.
bugs.fix: Added missing reviewer_id column to approval_workflows table: ALTER TABLE approval_workflows ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reviewer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id);

bugs.root_cause: Condition was: if (!id)
approval_workflows CREATE TABLE missing reviewer_id column — the SQLAlchemy model defines it but the raw SQL migration does not include it, so INSERT fails with UndefinedColumnError
bugs.fix: Added reviewer_id UUID column to approval_workflows CREATE TABLE in database.py, plus ALTER TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for existing DBs

bugs.error_message: User list shows old department name after updating user dept_id
bugs.root_cause: Low severity — to_response() does a fresh DB query for dept name, so the issue is likely SQLAlchemy session caching of the User object from a prior query in the same request
bugs.fix: Add await db.refresh(user) after user update to force re-read from DB, or use await db.expire(user) before to_response

bugs.error_message: POST /api/extensions/output/generate with source=markdown requires file upload, does not support direct content string
bugs.root_cause: Generate endpoint only checks for file upload when source=markdown, no alternative content Form field exists
bugs.fix: Added content Form field as alternative to file upload — when content is provided, it is used directly as markdown source

bugs.root_cause: 2 lines replaced/restructured

bugs.error_message: Temporal Worker fails to start — RuntimeError: Failed validating workflow DynamicGraphWorkflow (sniffio._ThreadLocal restriction in sandbox)
bugs.root_cause: Temporal's sandboxed workflow runner imports the workflow module which transitively imports FastAPI (via __init__.py → routers.py). FastAPI's sniffio dependency uses _ThreadLocal subclass which is blocked by sandbox restrictions.
bugs.fix: Added UnsandboxedWorkflowRunner() to Worker init. The workflow code is trusted (runs in our own infra), so sandbox restrictions are unnecessary.

bugs.error_message: temporalio package not installed in Docker gateway container — ModuleNotFoundError
bugs.root_cause: temporalio[pydantic]>=1.27.0 was in pyproject.toml but uv sync inside Docker container did not install it (cached resolution from before it was added)
bugs.fix: Ran uv sync inside container to install. Added TEMPORAL_URL=eai-flow-temporal:7233 to docker-compose-dev.yaml gateway environment.

bugs.error_message: Project doc list tab shows 0 documents even though AI generated docs exist in the project
bugs.root_cause: ProjectDocListPanel filtered by folder=projectName, but AI-generated documents had folder='默认文件夹'. The folder-based filter was unreliable — documents belong to a project via project_id, not folder name.
bugs.fix: 1) Added project_id filter to backend docmgr list endpoint (service + router). 2) Updated frontend API client and useDocuments hook to support project_id. 3) Changed ProjectDocListPanel to filter by project_id instead of folder name.
